LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT KIRK MAUER'S MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY RESPONSES IS OFF CALENDAR. DEFENDANT FAILED TO COMPLY WITH THE ORDER SHORTENING TIME ISSUED ON JUNE 18, 2014. FIRST, DEFENDANT FAILED TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITH THE MOVING PAPERS; DEFENDANT FILED THE MOVING PAPERS ON JUNE 18, 2014 AND FILED THE PROOF OF SERVICE ON JUNE 23, 2014. SECOND, DEFENDANT FAILED TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302 ON THE SAME DATE OF FILING. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED. (302)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-15-2014 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions Against Gabriel Mendoza
Off Calendar Oct-08-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

RULING: DEFENDANT KIRK MAUER Motion For Terminating Sanctions Against Gabriel Mendoza is GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED. Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

Notice Of Motion To Compel Discovery Response And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-04-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Leiann Laiks, of Fusion Law Group, Tel: 415.625.3953, for defendants and moving party;

No other appearance.

RULING: The Court adopts the tentative ruling on DEFENDANT KIRK MAUER's Motion To Compel Discovery Response And For Monetary Sanctions. Mauer's Motion to Compel is GRANTED. Mauer's request for sanctions is GRANTED in the amount of $800.00, to be paid to Mauer no later than 14 days after service of notice of entry of order. ORDER SIGNED. Judge Pro Tem: Douglas Robbins; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-01-2014 Continued To Oct-20-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-01-2014 Text Ruling

Defendant Kirk Mauer'S Motion To Compel Discovery Responses
Off Calendar Jun-27-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT KIRK MAUER'S Motion To Compel Discovery Responses is off calendar. Defendant failed to comply with the Order Shortening Time issued on June 18, 2014. First, Defendant failed to file proof of service with the moving papers; Defendant filed the moving papers on June 18, 2014 and filed the proof of service on June 23, 2014. Second, Defendant failed to provide courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302 on the same date of filing. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

Mtn To Compel Disco Responses
Off Calendar Jun-27-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT KIRK MAUER's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses is To be heard at 9:30 am on the Law and Motion calendar. Judge Pro Tem: Tom Cohen, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-18-2013 Set For Trial On Jul-07-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
